tasks.subject: Task 1: Feedback mechanism — URL constant, hook, i18n
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Tested single source of truth for the Nexus feedback URL, a shared useOpenFeedback hook (opens it, toasts on failure), and feedback.* strings in all four locales.

**Files:** src/lib/nexusUrl.ts(+test), src/hooks/useOpenFeedback.ts(+test), src/i18n/locales/{en,zh-Hans,ru,ar}.json

**Verify:** npx vitest run src/lib/nexusUrl.test.ts src/hooks/useOpenFeedback.test.tsx src/i18n/locales/parity.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/lib/nexusUrl.ts","src/lib/nexusUrl.test.ts","src/hooks/useOpenFeedback.ts","src/hooks/useOpenFeedback.test.tsx","src/i18n/locales/en.json","src/i18n/locales/zh-Hans.json","src/i18n/locales/ru.json","src/i18n/locales/ar.json"],"verifyCommand":"npx vitest run src/lib/nexusUrl.test.ts src/hooks/useOpenFeedback.test.tsx src/i18n/locales/parity.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["FEEDBACK_NEXUS_POSTS_URL resolves to slaythespire2/mods/856?tab=posts","useOpenFeedback calls invoke open_external_url with that URL","hook toasts feedback.couldntOpen on failure","all four locales have feedback.* keys, parity passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Send feedback button in About footer
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Discoverable Send feedback action in the About footer that opens the Nexus Posts page.

**Files:** src/components/AboutCard.tsx(+test)

**Verify:** npx vitest run src/components/AboutCard.test.tsx

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/components/AboutCard.tsx","src/components/AboutCard.test.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"npx vitest run src/components/AboutCard.test.tsx","acceptanceCriteria":["footer renders a Send feedback button","clicking calls invoke open_external_url with FEEDBACK_NEXUS_POSTS_URL","existing AboutCard tests still pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: No-GitHub Nexus row in bug-report modal
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Offer the Nexus feedback alternative inside the Report a bug modal without changing the existing GitHub/diagnostic flow.

**Files:** src/components/DiagnosticBundle.tsx(+test)

**Verify:** npx vitest run src/components/DiagnosticBundle.test.tsx

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/components/DiagnosticBundle.tsx","src/components/DiagnosticBundle.test.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"npx vitest run src/components/DiagnosticBundle.test.tsx","acceptanceCriteria":["modal renders the Post feedback on the Nexus page button + note","clicking calls invoke open_external_url with FEEDBACK_NEXUS_POSTS_URL","existing DiagnosticBundle tests still pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Send feedback button in logs viewer
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Offer the Nexus feedback alternative next to Send to support in the logs viewer (Settings > Advanced).

**Files:** src/components/LogsViewer.tsx(+test)

**Verify:** npx vitest run src/components/LogsViewer.test.tsx

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/components/LogsViewer.tsx","src/components/LogsViewer.test.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"npx vitest run src/components/LogsViewer.test.tsx","acceptanceCriteria":["logs bar renders a Send feedback button","clicking calls invoke open_external_url with FEEDBACK_NEXUS_POSTS_URL","existing LogsViewer tests still pass"]}
```
